steps.title: Minimal bar
preconditions: The app is open on fake-pin with no active review
A reference screenshot has been retained privately
steps.human_instruction: Drag the small review bar to two positions, collapse and restore it, then interact with the Pin underneath.
steps.human_question: Did anything move unexpectedly, clip, reset, or prevent you from using the Pin?
agent_assertions: Product geometry does not resize or refit

steps.title: Full-screen round trip
preconditions: The product is in an obvious non-default state
steps.human_instruction: Open the full review, read the visible history, then return to the product.
steps.human_question: Was the history readable, and did the product return exactly as you left it?
agent_assertions: Product state and geometry are preserved
The keyboard does not obstruct the view before composing

steps.title: Send a reply
preconditions: A second review is privately registered and waiting
steps.human_instruction: From the full review, send this reply: “Pin response is clear; ask me about the anchor.”
steps.human_question: Did anything prevent the reply from sending normally?
agent_assertions: Exactly one read-only reply is appended
The primary review retains the active slot
The waiting review does not activate

steps.title: Answer a follow-up
preconditions: The C3 reply has been collected
One free-text follow-up is visible in the same review
steps.human_instruction: Answer the visible follow-up with: “The drift begins when returning to fit.”
steps.human_question: Did the question and your answer appear in a clear, natural order?
agent_assertions: Question and answer are appended once in order
The waiting review does not activate

steps.title: Relaunch restoration
preconditions: The same review remains active after C4
The product is in a recognizable state
steps.human_instruction: Close TuberNotes completely, then launch it once and return to the review.
steps.human_question: Did the review and product return exactly where you left them, without duplicate or stale controls?
agent_assertions: Active review and waiting order restore
History restores once and in order
Surface metadata and product state restore
